allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Imalsha Sudheera\\booking-clone"; $env:DATABASE_URL = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match '^DATABASE_URL=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^DATABASE_URL=', '' }\); $sql = 'SELECT id, email, role FROM "User" LIMIT 10;'; $sql | npx prisma db execute --stdin --url $env:DATABASE_URL 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Imalsha Sudheera\\booking-clone"; $body = '{"name":"Test","email":"chamara@gmail.com","password":"TestPass123"}'; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/signup" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $response.Content)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Imalsha Sudheera\\booking-clone"; $body = '{"email":"chamara@gmail.com","password":"TestPass123"}'; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $response.Content; Write-Host "Set-Cookie:" \($response.Headers["Set-Cookie"]\))

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Imalsha Sudheera\\booking-clone"; $body = '{"name":"Test2","email":"chamara2@gmail.com","password":"TestPass123"}'; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.1.191:3000/api/auth/signup" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $response.Content)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Imalsha Sudheera\\booking-clone"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/signup" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Page status:" $r.StatusCode; if \($r.Content -match "window\\.location\\.href"\) { Write-Host "NEW code is live \(window.location.href found\)" } elseif \($r.Content -match "router\\.push"\) { Write-Host "OLD code still running \(router.push found\)" } else { Write-Host "Cannot determine version" } } catch { Write-Host "Dev server not responding:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Imalsha Sudheera\\booking-clone"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/signup" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match "type=.button."\) { Write-Host "NEW button \(type=button\) found in HTML" } else { Write-Host "OLD button \(type=submit\) still in HTML" }; if \($r.Content -match "handleSignup|handleLogin"\) { Write-Host "Handler names present in HTML" } else { Write-Host "No handler names in HTML \(server component or inlined\)" })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Imalsha Sudheera\\booking-clone"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/signup" -UseBasicParsing; $scripts = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, '/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\\.js'\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value -Unique | Select-Object -First 5; $scripts | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Script:" $_ }; Write-Host "Total script refs:" \([regex]::Matches\($r.Content, '_next/static'\).Count\))
